name: DesignWebsiteTool
label: Design Website
description: Loads the frontend-design skill and returns a structured website design brief for artifact rendering.
whenToUse: Use when the user asks to design, redesign, style, or create a website, landing page, frontend page, or visual web interface.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for backend-only work, database CRUD, project management CRUD, or non-visual writing tasks.
outputContract: Returns JSON with frontend-design skill guidance and request context. The assistant must use that guidance to generate a website_design artifact marker.

name: resolve_artifact_contract
label: Resolve artifact contract
description: Internal runtime tool that resolves the best artifact contract for structured UI output.
whenToUse: Use when structured UI output may be useful, including explicit artifact requests, contract-bound tool results, and assistant-authored artifacts.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for business data lookup, persistence, or when the response should remain plain text.
outputContract: Returns the single best artifact contract for the current source and intent. Alternatives are exceptional and returned only when resolver confidence is low.

name: ProjectCrudTool
label: Project CRUD
description: Create, list, inspect, update, and delete projects in the active workspace.
whenToUse: Use when an admin asks to manage projects for the active workspace.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for task CRUD, user management, or requests from non-admin workspace members.
outputContract: Returns JSON with status, action, and a project or projects payload scoped to the active workspace.
